name: Battle of Lexington and Concord
description: Opening battles of the American Revolutionary War, April 19, 1775, Lexington and Concord, Massachusetts.

name: Battle of Bunker Hill
description: Early battle of the American Revolutionary War, June 17, 1775, Charlestown, Massachusetts.

name: Battle of Saratoga
description: Turning point of the American Revolutionary War, October 1777, Saratoga County, New York.

name: Siege of Yorktown
description: Final major land battle of the American Revolutionary War, September-October 1781, Yorktown, Virginia.

name: Battle of Trenton
description: Decisive American victory after Washington's crossing of the Delaware River, December 26, 1776.

name: Battle of Brandywine
description: British victory that led to the capture of Philadelphia, September 11, 1777, Pennsylvania.

name: Battle of Camden
description: Major British victory in the Southern Campaign, August 16, 1780, Camden, South Carolina.

name: Battle of Cowpens
description: Decisive American victory in the Southern Campaign, January 17, 1781, South Carolina.

name: Battle of Guilford Court House
description: Battle in North Carolina that weakened British forces, March 15, 1781.

name: Battle of Fort McHenry
description: Defense of Baltimore harbor inspiring the Star-Spangled Banner, September 13-14, 1814.

name: Battle of New Orleans
description: Final major battle of the War of 1812, January 8, 1815, Chalmette, Louisiana.

name: Battle of Lake Erie
description: American naval victory on Lake Erie, September 10, 1813, securing the Northwest Territory.

name: Battle of Lundy's Lane
description: One of the bloodiest battles of the War of 1812, July 25, 1814, Niagara Falls area.

name: Battle of the Thames
description: American victory in which Tecumseh was killed, October 5, 1813, Ontario, Canada.

name: Battle of Palo Alto
description: First major battle of the Mexican-American War, May 8, 1846, near present-day Brownsville, Texas.

name: Battle of Resaca de la Palma
description: Second battle of the Mexican-American War, May 9, 1846, Texas.

name: Battle of Buena Vista
description: American victory under Zachary Taylor against Santa Anna, February 22-23, 1847, Mexico.

name: Battle of Monterrey
description: American capture of the city of Monterrey, September 21-24, 1846, Mexico.

name: Battle of Chapultepec
description: Storming of Chapultepec Castle leading to Mexico City's fall, September 12-13, 1847.

name: First Battle of Bull Run
description: First major land battle of the American Civil War, July 21, 1861, Prince William County, Virginia.

name: Second Battle of Bull Run
description: Major Confederate victory under General Lee, August 28-30, 1862, Prince William County, Virginia.

name: Battle of Shiloh
description: Major and bloody Civil War battle in Tennessee, April 6-7, 1862.

name: Battle of Antietam
description: Bloodiest single day in American military history, September 17, 1862, Sharpsburg, Maryland.

name: Battle of Fredericksburg
description: Major Confederate victory, December 11-15, 1862, Fredericksburg, Virginia.

name: Battle of Chancellorsville
description: Lee's greatest victory; Stonewall Jackson mortally wounded, April 30-May 6, 1863, Virginia.

name: Battle of Gettysburg
description: Turning point of the Civil War and largest battle ever fought in North America, July 1-3, 1863.

name: Siege of Vicksburg
description: Union siege that split the Confederacy by controlling the Mississippi River, May 18-July 4, 1863.

name: Battle of Chickamauga
description: Major Confederate victory in Georgia, September 18-20, 1863.

name: Battle of Chattanooga
description: Union victory that opened the way for the Atlanta Campaign, November 23-25, 1863.

name: Battle of the Wilderness
description: Opening engagement of Grant's Overland Campaign, May 5-7, 1864, Virginia.

name: Battle of Spotsylvania Court House
description: Brutal fighting during Grant's Overland Campaign, May 8-21, 1864, Virginia.

name: Battle of Cold Harbor
description: Costly Union assault near Richmond, May 31-June 12, 1864, Virginia.

name: Siege of Petersburg
description: Nine-month siege leading to the fall of Richmond, June 9, 1864-March 25, 1865, Virginia.

name: Battle of Atlanta
description: Series of battles leading to the fall of Atlanta, July 22, 1864, Georgia.

name: Battle of Nashville
description: Decisive Union victory that destroyed the Confederate Army of Tennessee, December 15-16, 1864.

name: Battle of Fort Sumter
description: Opening battle of the Civil War, Confederate capture of Fort Sumter, April 12-14, 1861.

name: Battle of Wilson's Creek
description: First major Civil War battle west of the Mississippi River, August 10, 1861, Missouri.

name: Battle of Pea Ridge
description: Union victory securing Missouri for the North, March 7-8, 1862, Arkansas.

name: Battle of Fort Donelson
description: Grant's first major victory, earning him nickname Unconditional Surrender Grant, February 11-16, 1862.

name: Battle of Cedar Creek
description: Sheridan's dramatic rallying of Union troops to victory in the Shenandoah Valley, October 19, 1864.

name: Battle of Five Forks
description: Union victory that led to Lee's evacuation of Petersburg and Richmond, April 1, 1865, Virginia.

name: Battle of Little Bighorn
description: Decisive Lakota/Cheyenne victory over the 7th Cavalry under Custer, June 25-26, 1876, Montana.

name: Wounded Knee Massacre
description: Massacre of Lakota Sioux by the 7th Cavalry Regiment, December 29, 1890, South Dakota.

name: Sand Creek Massacre
description: Massacre of Cheyenne and Arapaho encampment by Colorado militia, November 29, 1864.

name: Battle of Adobe Walls
description: Battle between buffalo hunters and Comanche, Kiowa, and Cheyenne warriors, June 27, 1874, Texas.

name: Battle of Beecher Island
description: Nine-day stand of US Army scouts against Cheyenne and Sioux warriors, September 17-25, 1868, Colorado.

name: Battle of Summit Springs
description: Decisive US Army victory over Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, July 11, 1869, Colorado.

name: Battle of the Rosebud
description: Sioux and Cheyenne halted Crook's advance one week before Little Bighorn, June 17, 1876, Montana.

name: Battle of Bear Paw
description: Final battle of the Nez Perce War; Chief Joseph surrendered, September 30-October 5, 1877, Montana.

name: Battle of San Juan Hill
description: Rough Riders under Theodore Roosevelt charge San Juan Hill, July 1, 1898, Santiago, Cuba.

name: Battle of Manila Bay
description: Commodore Dewey's decisive naval victory over Spanish fleet, May 1, 1898, Philippines.

name: Battle of Fallen Timbers
description: US victory over Western Confederacy opening the Northwest Territory, August 20, 1794, Ohio.

name: Battle of Tippecanoe
description: Harrison defeated Tecumseh's confederacy, November 7, 1811, Indiana.

name: Battle of Horseshoe Bend
description: Jackson destroyed Creek Nation resistance, March 27, 1814, Alabama.

name: Battle of Lundy's Lane
description: One of the bloodiest battles of the War of 1812, July 25, 1814, near Niagara Falls.

name: Battle of Kings Mountain
description: Patriot militia victory over Loyalists in the Southern Campaign, October 7, 1780, South Carolina.

name: Battle of Monmouth
description: Last major battle in the Northern theater of the Revolution, June 28, 1778, New Jersey.

name: Battle of Kennesaw Mountain
description: Confederate repulse of Sherman's frontal assault during the Atlanta Campaign, June 27, 1864, Georgia.

name: Battle of Perryville
description: Largest Civil War battle in Kentucky, October 8, 1862.

name: Battle of Stones River
description: Indecisive but costly battle near Murfreesboro, Tennessee, December 31, 1862-January 2, 1863.

name: Battle of Champion Hill
description: Key Union victory on the road to Vicksburg, May 16, 1863, Mississippi.

name: Battle of Spotsylvania
description: Brutal fighting during Grant's Overland Campaign, May 8-21, 1864, Virginia.

name: Battle of Appomattox Court House
description: Lee's final battle before surrender to Grant, ending the Civil War, April 9, 1865, Virginia.
